title: linum usitatissimum var. cribrosum
intro: Linum usitatissimum var. cribrosum is a variety of flaxseed plant, which is a flowering plant in the family Linaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health due to its high levels of omega-3 fatty acids and lignans. The health benefits of Linum usitatissimum var. cribrosum include supporting digestive health, reducing symptoms of menopause, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. Herbal preparations of this plant include capsules, oil, and tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
